slides.title: Your bones are *alive*, and you can build them.
slides.sub: Bone is living tissue that responds to how you move. The time to strengthen it is now.

slides.title: Bone is living tissue
slides.body: It constantly rebuilds itself in response to load. The right stress *signals it to stay strong*.

slides.title: Density slips with age
slides.body: Bone mass tends to decline after about age 30. In later life, a fracture *can be genuinely dangerous*.

slides.title: Load tells bone to stay
slides.body: Resistance training and impact, like brisk walking or light jumping, *signal bone to stay dense*.

slides.title: Feed the building work
slides.body: Enough protein, calcium and vitamin D *give bone what it needs*. Movement provides the signal, food the materials.

slides.title: Start before you need it
slides.body: You cannot wait until a break to begin. Weight-bearing movement now *can protect you* for decades.

slides.title: Build the bone that *holds you up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your movement, steps and habits into one daily score and a simple plan for tomorrow.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
slides.tag: build it before you need it

caption:
Your bones are alive. They rebuild in response to how you move, which means you can make them stronger. 🦴

Resistance training, a little impact, and enough protein, calcium and vitamin D can support the bone that prevents late-life fractures. Start before you need it. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily movement into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Build Stronger Bones Before You Need Them
